examples.title: Algorithm: Assigning Values to Structure Members
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating how to assign values to structure members
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AssignValues
INPUT: structure, memberName, value
OUTPUT: updated structure

BEGIN
 structure.memberName = value
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode shows the basic steps for assigning a value to a structure member.

examples.title: Python: Assigning Values to Structure Members
examples.description: Python implementation demonstrating how to assign values to structure members
examples.explanation: In Python, we can define a class to represent a structure and assign values to its members using the dot operator.

examples.title: C: Assigning Values to Structure Members
examples.description: C implementation demonstrating how to assign values to structure members
examples.explanation: In C, we define a struct to represent a structure and assign values to its members using the dot operator. For string members, we use strcpy.

examples.title: C: Assigning Values to Structure Members using Pointers
examples.description: C implementation demonstrating how to assign values to structure members using pointers
examples.explanation: In C, we can also use pointers to structures and assign values to their members using the arrow operator.
